for their studies. 

Due to the limited historical claims pattern available in the 30 CCW Chronic Conditions file, researchers should use 
caution with the “ever” dates, since many beneficiaries may have had a first occurrence date for the condition (as 
specified using the 27 CCW Chronic Condition coding) that preceded 2016. Using the “ever” dates in the 30 CCW 
Chronic Conditions file to identify beneficiaries with a prior history of the condition, may not yield accurate 
information
